attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SET_ID, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SET_NAME, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SET_TYPE, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SCHEDULE_ARRIVAL_DATE, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SET_STATUS, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.ORDERED_QUANTITY_UOM, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.LINE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SHIP_TOLERANCE_ABOVE, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SHIP_TOLERANCE_BELOW, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_OE_SETS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_OE_SETS STG_CG1_OE_SETS,
 (
 select SET_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_OE_SETS
 minus
 select SET_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_OE_SETS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SET_ID = STG_CG1_OE_SETS.SET_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_OE_SETS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_OE_SETS)
